title: Application - Update from previous app version while using cloud account (TBD)
scenario: Cloud account user experiences issue when updating Poly Studio Mobile app from previous version
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android device.
2. Ensure user is logged in with a cloud account.
3. Navigate to Account screen and note the current app version (e.g., under Settings → About or Account).
5. Open Google Play Store and search for Poly Studio Mobile.
6. If an update is available, tap Update to install the latest version.
7. Once the update completes, launch Poly Studio Mobile app again.
8. Observe the app behavior after the update.
expected: The app updates successfully. The user remains logged in with the same cloud account. All account data, device pairings, and settings are preserved after the update.
